policy: Only reports promoted by Obscura.Eval.AuthoritativeManifest after integrity validation are authoritative.

reports.command: OBSCURA_EVAL_REAL_MODEL=1 OBSCURA_REAL_MODEL_BACKEND=emily OBSCURA_EMILY_DEVICE=gpu OBSCURA_EMILY_FALLBACK=raise mix obscura.eval --compatibility --dataset generated_large --profile accurate --entities credit_card,email,ip_address,location,person,phone,url,us_ssn --full --real-model --backend emily --template-split template_heldout

environment.accelerator: Apple Metal GPU

limitations: Presidio-Research template_heldout_full compatibility report using deterministic recognizers and an output-aware two-model local NER cascade.
TNER remains primary for person, organization, and location; Jean-Baptiste contributes only policy-selected location recovery spans.
The cascade policy must be selected only on template_train and evaluated unchanged on heldout datasets.
This profile is experimental and cannot replace :balanced unless fresh accuracy, latency, and reproducibility gates pass.

reports.command: OBSCURA_EVAL_REAL_MODEL=1 OBSCURA_REAL_MODEL_BACKEND=emily OBSCURA_EMILY_DEVICE=gpu OBSCURA_EMILY_FALLBACK=raise mix obscura.eval --compatibility --dataset nemotron_pii_test_subset --profile accurate --entities credit_card,email,ip_address,location,person,phone,url,us_ssn --full --real-model --backend emily

environment.accelerator: Apple Metal GPU

limitations: Presidio-Research full compatibility report using deterministic recognizers and an output-aware two-model local NER cascade.
TNER remains primary for person, organization, and location; Jean-Baptiste contributes only policy-selected location recovery spans.
The cascade policy must be selected only on template_train and evaluated unchanged on heldout datasets.
This profile is experimental and cannot replace :balanced unless fresh accuracy, latency, and reproducibility gates pass.

reports.command: OBSCURA_EVAL_REAL_MODEL=1 OBSCURA_REAL_MODEL_BACKEND=emily OBSCURA_EMILY_DEVICE=gpu OBSCURA_EMILY_FALLBACK=raise mix obscura.eval --compatibility --dataset synth_dataset_v2 --profile accurate --entities credit_card,email,ip_address,location,person,phone,url,us_ssn --full --real-model --backend emily

environment.accelerator: Apple Metal GPU

limitations: Presidio-Research full compatibility report using deterministic recognizers and an output-aware two-model local NER cascade.
TNER remains primary for person, organization, and location; Jean-Baptiste contributes only policy-selected location recovery spans.

reports.command: OBSCURA_EVAL_REAL_MODEL=1 OBSCURA_REAL_MODEL_BACKEND=emily OBSCURA_EMILY_DEVICE=gpu OBSCURA_EMILY_FALLBACK=raise mix obscura.eval --compatibility --dataset generated_large --profile balanced --entities credit_card,email,ip_address,location,person,phone,url,us_ssn --full --real-model --backend emily

environment.accelerator: Apple Metal GPU

limitations: Presidio-Research template_heldout_full compatibility report using deterministic recognizers plus tner/roberta-large-ontonotes5 with conservative model-specific policy.

The TNER model card reports strong OntoNotes5 results but warns that plain Transformers usage is not recommended because the CRF layer is unsupported; Bumblebee/Nx output must therefore be treated as experimental until measured.
DATE/TIME and noisy non-PII OntoNotes labels are ignored by default; organization is allowed only behind higher threshold and context gating.

reports.command: OBSCURA_EVAL_REAL_MODEL=1 OBSCURA_REAL_MODEL_BACKEND=emily OBSCURA_EMILY_DEVICE=gpu OBSCURA_EMILY_FALLBACK=raise mix obscura.eval --compatibility --dataset nemotron_pii_test_subset --profile balanced --entities credit_card,email,ip_address,location,person,phone,url,us_ssn --full --real-model --backend emily

environment.accelerator: Apple Metal available but not used by spaCy

limitations: Real Presidio AnalyzerEngine run using local spaCy en_core_web_lg.
Python metrics are diagnostic only; authoritative metrics are recomputed by Obscura.Eval.Metrics.
Unsupported gold entities are counted separately from false negatives.
Raw text and detected values are omitted from reports and from the local JSONL prediction export.
Presidio runs on CPU. Latency is not directly comparable to Obscura GPU profiles.

Apple Metal GPU available; CPU used

limitations: Presidio-Research template_heldout_full compatibility report using deterministic local recognizers.
Person and location recognizers are context-limited and are not broad NER replacements.
Address recognition is limited to explicit generated Presidio-Research address contexts.
Unsupported entities remain separate from analyzer failures.

reports.command: OBSCURA_EVAL_PRIVACY_FILTER_NATIVE=1 OBSCURA_PRIVACY_FILTER_BACKEND=emily OBSCURA_EMILY_DEVICE=gpu OBSCURA_EMILY_FALLBACK=raise OBSCURA_PRIVACY_FILTER_CHECKPOINT=.cache/privacy-filter/openmed-nemotron-v2 mix obscura.eval --compatibility --dataset generated_large --template-split template_heldout --profile openmed_pii --entities credit_card,email,ip_address,location,person,phone,url,us_ssn --full --privacy-filter-native --backend emily

environment.accelerator: Apple Metal GPU

limitations: Presidio-Research template_heldout_full compatibility report for the optional native privacy-filter adapter.
This profile uses privacy-filter alone so it can be compared directly against a Python privacy-filter reference run.
The profile is opt-in and experimental. It is not a default recognizer path.

serving_backend_metadata.parity_warning_reason: Emily GPU BF16 QKV dot/matmul does not currently match Python OPF exactly; use BinaryBackend for Python-original numeric parity validation.
